texto: I just could not leave the people who ever fill my heart. But if people leave, well, like today myself. That's why I'm afraid to get acquainted with a lot of people because I'm afraid of losing a lot of people too. In reality I always get acquainted with many people, how is this?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Vea Dreamer: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I just could not leave the people who ever fill my heart. But if people leave, well, like today m…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, friends, lonely pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e lonely.

frase_original: I just could not leave the people who ever fill my heart. But if people leave, well, like today myself. That's why I'm afraid to get acquainted with a lot of people because I'm afraid of losing a lot of people too. In reality I always get acquainted with many people, how is this?
